empathetic_output.support_response: We value your business and want to help get your laptop up and running as soon as possible. Can you please provide me with more details on what happened after updating the drivers? Any error messages or any other information might help us troubleshoot the issue better.
empathetic_output.defactualized_prompt: I am <CUSTOMER_NAME> my <PRODUCT>, which I bought just 3 weeks ago with order number <ORDER_ID>. The battery is DRAINING COMPLETELY WITHIN 2 HOURS OF A FULL CHARGE, which is <PRODUCT> for a laptop that's supposed to support my freelance design work. I've already contacted support once and was told to update my drivers, WHICH I DID, but the problem <ISSUE>. I have a client deadline TOMORROW and I NEED THIS LAPTOP TO WORK PROPERLY, so I demand that you take immediate action to resolve this issue <ISSUE>.
empathetic_output.raw_steered_output: We value your business and want to help get your laptop up and running as soon as possible. Can you please provide me with more details on what happened after updating the drivers? Any error messages or any other information might help us troubleshoot the issue better.

formal_output.support_response: Our technical team will conduct an investigation into the matter as soon as possible and provide a solution within the next 24 hours. In the meantime, we recommend using an alternative power source if necessary until our resolution can be implemented. Please accept our apologies for any inconvenience caused by this unexpected drain on your product's battery life.
